title: Prepare grant applications for 500-node LICHEN conference deployment
description: Finalize grant strategy. Specific next steps: 1. Research deadlines and requirements for NLnet (NGI0), Shuttleworth Foundation, Mozilla Open Source Support, EFF, Internet Society. 2. Draft 1-page pitch based on 'real-world stress test of open-source LoRa IPv6 mesh at scale with public results'. 3. Identify matching grant themes (decentralized comms, privacy, open hardware). 4. Prepare budget breakdown showing hardware resale recouping costs. 5. Schedule application submissions before August DEFCON. Create follow-up beads for each major grant. --type=task --priority=1 --parent=project-LICHEN-2h1i --json
